message:
chore(beads): remove redundant #![cfg(test)] attributes

Remove #![cfg(test)] inner attributes from concurrent_tests.rs and
wal_safety_tests.rs modules.

These modules are already conditionally compiled via #[cfg(test)] in
the parent mod.rs file:

    #[cfg(test)]
    mod concurrent_tests;
    #[cfg(test)]
    mod wal_safety_tests;

The inner #![cfg(test)] attribute is therefore redundant and can cause
confusion about the actual compilation condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
